LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO FEB-19-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOVES FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ON MARY FELLER'S CLAIM THAT A SIDEWALK DEFECT WAS A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF PUBLIC PROPERTY AND ON GORDON FELLER'S CLAIM FOR LOSS OF CONSORTIUM. THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING). ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; COURT REPORTER: MARY GALLAGHER, CSR# 10749 (TEL: 855-777-78650. (301/CVA)
